name: @web3solutions33/helium-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol (MCP 2026-07-28 RC & 2025-11-25 stateless schema) server providing programmatic SQL query access over the SNTL Helium × Solana DePIN datalake (2,048,427 live rows across 93 tables). Metered via HTTP 402 (x402Version: 2) on Solana Mainnet. Zero registration.
author: Web3 Solutions, LLC
